symbols.name: NetworkFileStorageProvider
symbols.summary: A file storage provider that extends LocalFileStorageProvider to access network shares with Windows credentials using minimal P/Invoke for token acquisition and RunImpersonated for execution.

syntax.content: public class NetworkFileStorageProvider : LocalFileStorageProvider, IFileStorageProvider

symbols.name: NetworkFileStorageProvider(string, string, IWindowsImpersonationService)
symbols.summary: Initializes a new instance of NetworkFileStorageProvider with the specified network share path and impersonation service.

syntax.content: public NetworkFileStorageProvider(string locationName, string rootPath, IWindowsImpersonationService impersonationService)

parameters.description: The logical name of the storage location.
The UNC path to the network share (e.g., \\server\share).
The Windows impersonation service to use.
The logical name of the storage location.
The UNC path to the network share (e.g., \\server\share).
The Windows impersonation service to use.

symbols.name: NetworkFileStorageProvider(string, string, string, string, string)
symbols.summary: Initializes a new instance of NetworkFileStorageProvider with the specified network share path and credentials.

syntax.content: public NetworkFileStorageProvider(string locationName, string rootPath, string username = null, string password = null, string domain = null)

parameters.description: The logical name of the storage location.
The UNC path to the network share (e.g., \\server\share).
The username for authentication (e.g., domain\username).
The password for authentication.
The domain for authentication (optional, defaults to the local machine).
The logical name of the storage location.
The UNC path to the network share (e.g., \\server\share).
The username for authentication (e.g., domain\username).
The password for authentication.
The domain for authentication (optional, defaults to the local machine).

symbols.name: ReadFileAsync(string, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Opens a readable stream for the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with the stream or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.ReadFileAsync("folder/file.txt", null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) using (var stream = result.Value) { /* Read stream */ }`

syntax.content: public override Task> ReadFileAsync(string path, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the stream on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the stream on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: WriteFileAsync(string, Stream, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Writes the provided stream to the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `using (var stream = new MemoryStream()) await provider.WriteFileAsync("folder/file.txt", stream, null, CancellationToken.None);`

syntax.content: public override Task WriteFileAsync(string path, Stream content, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to write to (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
The stream containing the data to write.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DiskFullError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to write to (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
The stream containing the data to write.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DiskFullError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: OpenWriteFileAsync(string, bool, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Opens a writable stream for the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with the stream or errors. Opening failures are returned in the result; write, flush, and dispose failures surface from the returned stream. Example: `var result = await provider.OpenWriteFileAsync("folder/file.txt", false, null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) await using (var stream = result.Value) { /* Write to stream */ }`

syntax.content: public override Task> OpenWriteFileAsync(string path, bool useTemporaryWrite = false, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to write to (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Whether the provider should stage writes in a temporary file/blob and publish on successful close.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the writable stream on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DiskFullError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to write to (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Whether the provider should stage writes in a temporary file/blob and publish on successful close.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the writable stream on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DiskFullError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: DeleteFileAsync(string, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Deletes the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.DeleteFileAsync("folder/file.txt", null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("File deleted");`

syntax.content: public override Task DeleteFileAsync(string path, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to delete (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to delete (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: GetChecksumAsync(string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Computes and returns a checksum (e.g., hash) for the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with the checksum or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.GetChecksumAsync("folder/file.txt", CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine($"Checksum: {result.Value}");`

syntax.content: public override Task> GetChecksumAsync(string path, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the checksum on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileSystemError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the checksum on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileSystemError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: GetFileMetadataAsync(string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Retrieves metadata for the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with the metadata or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.GetFileInfoAsync("folder/file.txt", CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine($"Size: {result.Value.Length}");`

syntax.content: public override Task> GetFileMetadataAsync(string path, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the metadata on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the metadata on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: SetFileMetadataAsync(string, FileMetadata, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Sets metadata for the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var metadata = new FileMetadata(); await provider.SetFileMetadataAsync("folder/file.txt", metadata, CancellationToken.None);`

syntax.content: public override Task SetFileMetadataAsync(string path, FileMetadata metadata, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
The metadata to set.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., InvalidMetadataError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
The metadata to set.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., InvalidMetadataError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: UpdateFileMetadataAsync(string, Func, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Updates specific fields in the metadata for the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with the updated metadata or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.UpdateFileMetadataAsync("folder/file.txt", m => m.WithLength(1024), CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine($"Updated metadata: {result.Value.Length}");`

syntax.content: public override Task> UpdateFileMetadataAsync(string path, Func metadataUpdate, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
A function that updates the existing metadata.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the updated metadata on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., InvalidMetadataError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
A function that updates the existing metadata.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the updated metadata on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., InvalidMetadataError, PermissionError).

syntax.content: public override Task Files, string NextContinuationToken)>> ListFilesAsync(string path, string searchPattern = null, bool recursive = false, string continuationToken = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: CopyFileAsync(string, string, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Copies a file or blob from the source path to the destination path, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.CopyFileAsync("folder/source.txt", "folder/dest.txt", null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("File copied");`

syntax.content: public override Task CopyFileAsync(string sourcePath, string destinationPath, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The destination path to copy to (e.g., "folder/destination.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The destination path to copy to (e.g., "folder/destination.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: RenameFileAsync(string, string, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Renames a file or blob from the old path to the new path, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.RenameFileAsync("folder/old.txt", "folder/new.txt", null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("File renamed");`

syntax.content: public override Task RenameFileAsync(string oldPath, string newPath, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: MoveFileAsync(string, string, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Moves a file or blob from the source path to the destination path, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.MoveFileAsync("folder/source.txt", "folder/dest.txt", null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("File moved");`

syntax.content: public override Task MoveFileAsync(string sourcePath, string destinationPath, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The destination path to move to (e.g., "folder/destination.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The destination path to move to (e.g., "folder/destination.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: CopyFilesAsync(IEnumerable, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Copies multiple files or blobs from source paths to destination paths, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.CopyFilesAsync(new[] { ("folder/source.txt", "folder/dest.txt") }, null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("Files copied");`

syntax.content: public override Task CopyFilesAsync(IEnumerable filePairs, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: A collection of source-destination path pairs to copy.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed across all operations.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., PartialCopyError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: A collection of source-destination path pairs to copy.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed across all operations.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., PartialCopyError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: MoveFilesAsync(IEnumerable, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Moves multiple files or blobs from source paths to destination paths, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.MoveFilesAsync(new[] { ("folder/source.txt", "folder/dest.txt") }, null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("Files moved");`

syntax.content: public override Task MoveFilesAsync(IEnumerable filePairs, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: A collection of source-destination path pairs to move.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed across all operations.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., PartialMoveError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: A collection of source-destination path pairs to move.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed across all operations.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., PartialMoveError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: DeleteFilesAsync(IEnumerable, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Deletes multiple files or blobs at the specified paths, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.DeleteFilesAsync(new[] { "folder/file.txt" }, null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("Files deleted");`

syntax.content: public override Task DeleteFilesAsync(IEnumerable paths, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: A collection of paths to delete.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed across all operations.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., PartialDeleteError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: A collection of paths to delete.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed across all operations.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., PartialDeleteError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: DirectoryExistsAsync(string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Determines if the specified path represents a directory (virtual or actual), returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.IsDirectoryAsync("folder/subfolder", CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("Is a directory");`

syntax.content: public override Task DirectoryExistsAsync(string path, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to check (e.g., "folder/subfolder").
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., PathNotFoundError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to check (e.g., "folder/subfolder").
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., PathNotFoundError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: CreateDirectoryAsync(string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Creates a directory (or virtual folder) at the specified path, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.CreateDirectoryAsync("folder/subfolder", CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("Directory created");`

syntax.content: public override Task CreateDirectoryAsync(string path, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to create (e.g., "folder/subfolder").
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DirectoryExistsError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to create (e.g., "folder/subfolder").
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DirectoryExistsError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: DeleteDirectoryAsync(string, bool, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Deletes the directory (or virtual folder) at the specified path, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.DeleteDirectoryAsync("folder/subfolder", true, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("Directory deleted");`

syntax.content: public override Task DeleteDirectoryAsync(string path, bool recursive, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to delete (e.g., "folder/subfolder").
Whether to delete contents recursively.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DirectoryNotEmptyError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to delete (e.g., "folder/subfolder").
Whether to delete contents recursively.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DirectoryNotEmptyError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: ListDirectoriesAsync(string, string, bool, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Lists directories matching the search pattern under the specified path, returning a Result with the directory list or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.ListDirectoriesAsync("folder/", "*sub*", true, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) foreach (var dir in result.Value) Console.WriteLine(dir);`

syntax.content: public override Task>> ListDirectoriesAsync(string path, string searchPattern = null, bool recursive = false, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The base path (e.g., directory or container prefix).
Pattern to filter directories (e.g., "*sub*").
Whether to include subdirectories.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the directory list on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., AccessDeniedError, FileSystemError).

parameters.description: The base path (e.g., directory or container prefix).
Pattern to filter directories (e.g., "*sub*").
Whether to include subdirectories.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the directory list on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., AccessDeniedError, FileSystemError).

symbols.name: CheckHealthAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Checks connectivity and basic access to the storage location, returning a Result with success or errors. Returns false if the location is unreachable or permissions are insufficient, triggering a health alert. Example: `var result = await provider.CheckHealthAsync(CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("Storage is healthy");`

syntax.content: public override Task CheckHealthAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., ConnectionError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., ConnectionError, PermissionError).
